title: The Ravenous
description: A mysterious and scary mob that will leave you no escape!
body:
## If you want to leave feedback, feel free to use the comment space below or the dedicated channel in the WanMine Discord server. *** _You are allowed to include this mod in a modpack hosted on CurseForge, provided that you do not redistribute it elsewhere and only use versions uploaded directly by us. Additionally, the modpack must not be sold or offer paid access to the mod in any form. You must also fully comply with the terms of the license applicable to the version of the mod you are using._ *** # NEW 2.0 BIG UPDATE OUT! Features below **** ![The Ravenous](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1218882/description_876cfceb-1f66-4b23-b66f-6a8723cc7708.png) # **An Endless Hunger** A piercing wail shatters the darkness. The Screech has seen you. It runs away, too weak to fight… but its scream is not one of fear. It’s a call. A call to something bigger. Something hungrier. In the shadows, the Ravenous awakens. Not to protect… but to feed. Now it has heard you. And it’s coming. The Screech is small, fast, and ruthless. It doesn’t fight, it doesn’t flee to survive. It bites you with quick attacks, then screams with all its might. It’s not a mistake. It’s not instinct. It’s intent. Because it knows that, at its signal, something will answer. Even if the Ravenous is far away, it will carve a path to reach you. You can’t hide. You can’t fight. The Ravenous is not just a hunter. It’s a nightmare that grows, evolving with every strike it takes. Its arms extend, its speed increases, every wound makes it stronger, every encounter leaves it hungrier. And as it devours everything in its path, your only hope is silence.   # **The Ravenous** **(THIS MOB IS NOT IMMORTAL)** ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1218882/description_4866c073-dcff-4068-b4ec-a27961d58486.png)
Spoiler

Main Features

🎖 Drop

The Ravenous drops his echolocator organ, useful to charge at the max capacity the Anti-Ravenous.

🔊 Acoustic Tracking
The Ravenous is blind but hunts using sound. Walking, jumping, or breaking blocks will draw it toward you. If you stay still, it might not find you… but it will keep searching.

🛠️ Block Destruction
Building walls won’t save you. The Ravenous can destroy nearly all blocks, except obsidian and bedrock. No shelter is truly safe.

📢 Devastating Scream
If you try to escape by climbing a pillar or hiding high up, the Ravenous will unleash a powerful roar. The shockwave will send you flying, leaving you stunned for a few seconds, making your screen shake.

🌑 Total Darkness
Its scream extinguishes light sources and shatters glass. Torches go out, lanterns break. The darkness becomes your prison.

🦴 Progressive Evolution
Every hit the Ravenous takes makes it stronger. It grows in size, becomes faster and more aggressive. Its mouths multiply, its claws extend, and its roar starts dealing damage. Attacking it is never the best choice.

🍖 Insatiable Hunger
The only way to distract it is to feed it. You can sacrifice a Villager or 10 animals (small animals count as half). If the Ravenous is full, it might lose interest… at least for a while.

🥚 Cycle of Hunger
Each time the Ravenous devours prey, it may leave behind a Screecher egg. The more it feeds, the faster the threat spreads. Its hunger never ends… it multiplies.

  # **The Screech** The Ravenous is a distant threat… until the Screech brings it straight to you. ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1218882/description_edd9dff5-3ba8-40a9-9713-7a6b5ac2009c.png) ****
Spoiler

Main Features

🎖 Drop

The Ravenous drops his echolocator organ, useful to craft the Anti-Ravenous, and can load 1 charge. 

🌙 Origin of the Screech
The Screech spawns naturally in the dark of night. It searches, it finds… and it will scream.

🦷 Bite and Run
The Screech doesn’t fight directly. It attacks with small bites and then moves away.

📣 Predator’s Call
The Screech will try to scream at the first opportunity. If you don’t stop it quickly, it will do what it was born to do: summon something much worse. If the Ravenous is not nearby, it will spawn.

🌱 Lethal Growth
If a Screech is left alive for too long, it will grow and become an adult Ravenous. Ignoring it only delays the inevitable.

*** # **Anti-Ravenous** A powerful weapon, as the name suggests, it could be useful in a fight with The Ravenous. ![AntiRavenous](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1218882/description_3110af02-6fcd-436e-ae26-cbc1065249f6.png)
Spoiler

Main Features

😵 Stun

When activated, the Anti-Ravenous will instantly Stun the Creature for about 7 seconds, leaving it in an excrutiating stun animation. Hurt it when you still have time...

🔊 How to use
Hold right click to Stun The Ravenous.

📢 How to charge
Hold an echolocation organ in the off-hand and the Anti-Ravenous in the main hand. Then, crouch and click the right mouse button.

🧨 The charges
The Anti-Ravenous can be charged with 2 organs:

Screecher echolocation organ, 1 charge given

The Ravenous echolocation organ, Max charges given

  *** # **Configs/Commands:**
Spoiler /RavenousHeartSound_true/false will enable/disable the heartbeat sound. default set:true /RavenousBreak_true/false will enable/disable The Ravenous breaking blocks mechanic. default set:true **/LowSpawnRate_true/false** will lower/normalize The Ravenous and Screecher's SpawnRate. default set:false **/AntiRavenousSound_true/false** will enable/disable the Anti-Ravenous sound. default set:true
![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1218882/description_77444517-5557-4ee1-a0cc-6e39b8f88367.jpeg)   # **The Ravenous mod is still in development, and more content will be added soon. Do you have what it takes to survive its hunger?**   **[![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1108604/description_9b110890-46c6-4d75-8b92-051b5e471d6d.png)](https://discord.gg/yEM85Y7BRr)**
